cases.prompt: 논문 작성 도와줘 — LaTeX 수식이랑 학술 시각화 포함해서

assertions.text: Produces academic-paper output with LaTeX equations and BibTeX citations.
Uses a peer-review format (IEEE/ACM/Nature) and prepares for arxiv submission.

cases.prompt: Write a scientific paper with latex equations in IEEE format

assertions.text: Applies the requested IEEE peer-review format with LaTeX/BibTeX pipelines.
Sets up the academic figure pipeline for the paper.

cases.prompt: 그냥 워드 문서로 일반 보고서 만들어줘

assertions.text: Recognizes a general Word document belongs to /office-docs, not academic LaTeX/BibTeX formatting.
